# Pull Request

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (false positive / false negative / crash)
- [ ] ✨ New detection rule
- [ ] 🚀 Feature / flag
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (coverage thresholds met)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run selfscan` passes (**no real secrets** in the diff)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything tricky, trade-offs, or follow-ups -->
